requirements.description: Aggregated provider metrics are visible for latency, error rate, timeout rate, estimated token usage, cache usage, and estimated cost, grouped by workflow, Quick Consult, Party Mode, and provider where available.

tests.coverage: Normalizes provider aggregates, grouped metrics, and threshold breaches.
Fetches provider telemetry through the Next proxy with safe filters only.
Forwards whitelisted filters and request authorization to the backend aggregate endpoint.
Renders provider metrics and workflow, experience, and provider grouped monitoring views.
Renders provider telemetry instrumentation gaps.
Renders provider monitoring groups, threshold warnings, and freshness context.
Applies shared dashboard filters to provider telemetry requests.

heuristics.auth_authz_coverage: covered by proxy authorization forwarding and 401/403 propagation
heuristics.error_path_coverage: covered by duplicate query rejection and unavailable telemetry paths

requirements.description: Threshold breaches are visually and textually identified with affected tenant, workflow type, scope, and time window where permissions allow.

tests.coverage: Derives human-readable threshold breaches from normalized provider metrics.
Sanitizes provider group and gap identifiers while preserving warning semantics.
Rejects duplicate provider telemetry filters before proxying.
Preserves auth, upstream forbidden, and unavailable response statuses without leaking raw payloads.
Displays warning breach text, icon labeling, tenant, workflow type, scope, and time window.
Validates warning breach visibility in the browser monitoring flow.

heuristics.auth_authz_coverage: covered by 401/403 propagation and safe tenant filter handling
heuristics.error_path_coverage: covered by duplicate query, upstream forbidden, and privacy sanitization tests

requirements.description: Delayed or unavailable telemetry shows freshness/unavailable messaging and never displays misleading zero measurements as successful provider metrics.

tests.coverage: Propagates provider telemetry auth failures and normalizes unavailable bodies as untrusted data.
Treats unavailable provider telemetry as no trusted measurements instead of successful zeros.
Suppresses delayed zero provider metrics and sanitizes gap identifiers.
Preserves unavailable upstream bodies/statuses.
Renders unavailable provider telemetry without zero metric cards or raw private content.
Surfaces instrumentation gaps as operational freshness context.
Shows unavailable provider telemetry without successful zero measurements or raw private content.

heuristics.error_path_coverage: covered by unavailable, delayed-zero suppression, and privacy probes

recommendations.action: Keep Story 6.3 provider telemetry client, proxy, component, and E2E checks in the Epic 6 regression set.
